title: Alladhe Siragiye Lyrics Rum
stanzas:
Rum Alladhe Siragiye Song Lyrics
Singers - Sid Sriram
Lyrics - Vivek

naan unai anaithu
uyir pathippaen.
kanneere vendaam
kaathu nirppaen.

saavaiyum thaduthu
vazhi marippen
unnai kaettal
naan enai koduppaen.

ne ittap pimbam
nizhala nilava endru
man thotta kaiyyil oliya

un mounach saththam
asayaa isaiyaa ennil
men kokkip podum visaya

ivan kaagitha idhagazhil
nagal eduppaen.
chinna niyabaga kumizhiyil
unnai adaippaen.
sendru vazhhndhida
adhisaya idam padaippaen

adhisaya idam padaippaen..
idam pidippaen..
nagal eduppaen..
unnai adaippaen..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the singer of the song Alladhe Siragiye?

The song is sung by the talented playback singer Sid Sriram.

Which movie features the song Alladhe Siragiye?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Rum, released in 2017.

Who composed the music for Alladhe Siragiye?

The music was composed by the renowned music director Anirudh Ravichander.

What is the theme of the song Alladhe Siragiye?

The song portrays emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its melody and lyrics.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Rum?

The lead roles in the movie Rum are played by Hrishikesh and Sanchita Shetty.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Alladhe Siragiye from the Tamil movie Rum, released in 2017, features the soulful voice of Sid Sriram with music composed by Anirudh Ravichander. The film stars Hrishikesh and Sanchita Shetty in lead roles. The lyrics, penned by Vivek, beautifully express themes of love and longing, resonating deeply with listeners. This melodious track captivates with its emotional depth and soothing composition, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical repertoire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Alladhe Siragiye, a mesmerizing track from the movie Rum, showcases the soulful voice of Sid Sriram combined with Anirudh's captivating music composition. The lyrics by Vivek beautifully convey emotions of love and longing, making it a standout melody. This song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and enchanting tunes, leaving listeners spellbound.
stanzaMeanings: Rum Alladhe Siragiye Song Lyrics Singers - Sid Sriram Lyrics - Vivek
Don't take away the beautiful one, the one who steals hearts.
In the beautiful desire, softly, little bird, flutter away.
I will give my life for you. Don't let my tears fall, hold the wind.
Even if death comes, I will find a way to give you my all if I call you.
You are the moonlight that touches my heart, shining in my hands.
Your silent sound is like a melody that fills my mind with joy.
I will paint your smile with colors of your dreams.
I will take this paper and write about you. In small memories, I will capture you. I will create a wonderful place to live.
I will create a wonderful place to live... I will hold on to it... I will write about you... I will capture you...
